name: Brehder
description: A female breggle with grey fur and grey clothes. When encountered, she was insensible and limp, her eyes milky white. She glowed under Detect Magic.
notes: Found incapacitated and being carried by her companions in the Wooden Wolves.
She touched a strange stone in the wilderness; color and vitality drained out of her entirely. The land around the stone was similarly drained and left grey.
Glows under Detect Magic — the nature of the enchantment is unclear.
